logo_description: PureFlow Water logo: a stylized water droplet with a rounded teardrop shape, filled in deep cobalt blue (#0057B8) with a small white crescent highlight on the upper-left to suggest light refraction, appearing on the front label of clear or frosted plastic bottles and glass bottles. The 'PureFlow' wordmark appears in clean white Helvetica Neue or similar geometric sans-serif type directly below the droplet, often on a translucent label wrapped around the bottle. On product packaging boxes the logo appears centered on a light sky-blue background. The droplet and wordmark also appear on bottle caps and the bottom-right corner of print ads.
required_contexts: active outdoor lifestyle or athletic scenes
prohibited_contexts: competitor beverage brands present in same frame
scenes depicting illness or negative health outcomes
